====Pokémon==== [[File:Ritchie party.png|thumb|left||220px|Ritchie and some of his Pokémon in [[Pokémon Chronicles]]]] [[File:Ritchie Poké Balls.png|thumb|220px|Ritchie's {{i|Poké Ball}}s]] Ritchie's Pokémon coincidentally tend to be similar to {{Ash}}'s first captures, either in [[Kanto]] or [[Hoenn]]. Despite this, Ritchie is also seen battling with a few different Pokémon, such as {{p|Pupitar}} and others shown during his [[Full Battle]] with [[Assunta]]. Also, Ritchie's Pokémon tend to be more obedient to their Trainer, largely due to Ritchie being a little more experienced than Ash at that time. [[Zippo]], for example, was shown to be more obedient to Ritchie than other {{p|Charmeleon}} shown in the {{pkmn|animated series}}, such as [[Ash's Charmeleon|Ash's]] and [[Trevor's Charmeleon|Trevor's]]. Ritchie puts stickers on his {{i|Poké Ball}}s to differentiate his Pokémon between others and is one of Ash's only [[rival]]s to give [[nickname]]s to his Pokémon. After meeting Ash, Ritchie is often seen accompanied by [[Sparky]] at his side, in a way similar to the relationship between Ash and his {{AP|Pikachu}}. {{MissingInfo|2|enva|java}} =====On hand===== This listing is of Ritchie's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: {{TrainerPoké |main=yes |nick=Sparky |trainer=Ritchie |pkmn=Pikachu |type1=Electric |img=Ritchie Sparky.png |epnum=EP078 |epname=A Friend in Deed |vaen=Satomi Koorogi |vajp=Satomi Koorogi |desc='''Sparky''' (Japanese: '''レオン''' ''Leon'') is Ritchie's main Pokémon, a {{p|Pikachu}}. It is distinguished from other Pikachu by a scruff of fur on the top of its head.}} {{TrainerPoké |main=yes |nick=Zippo |trainer=Ritchie |pkmn=Charmeleon |type1=Fire |img=Ritchie Zippo.png |epnum=EP078 |epname=A Friend in Deed |vaen=Eric Stuart |vajp=Yūji Ueda |desc='''Zippo''' (Japanese: '''ジッポ''' ''Zippo'') is Ritchie's {{p|Charmeleon}}. It first appeared as a {{p|Charmander}}, and [[Evolution|evolved]] by the time {{Ash}} and Ritchie met in the [[Whirl Islands]].}} {{TrainerPoké |nick=Happy |trainer=Ritchie |pkmn=Butterfree |type1=Bug |type2=Flying |img=Ritchie Happy.png |epnum=EP078 |epname=A Friend in Deed |vaen=Rikako Aikawa |vajp=Rikako Aikawa |desc='''Happy''' (Japanese: '''パピー''' ''Papi'') is Ritchie's {{p|Butterfree}}. After Ritchie and {{Ash}} foiled {{TRT}}'s plan to steal the Pokémon of everyone competing in the [[Pokémon League]], the van they were driving in was about to go over a cliff. Ash and Ritchie decided to use their Pokémon to help them land safely. Ash used his {{AP|Pidgeotto}}, while Ritchie sent out Happy. Thanks to their Pokémon, the two Trainers were able to land safely. Happy reappeared in ''[[EP079|Friend and Foe Alike]]'' during Ash and Ritchie's battle at [[Indigo Plateau]]. It was up against {{AP|Squirtle}}. It easily defeated the {{t|Water}} type by using {{m|Sleep Powder}}, which caused Squirtle to become disqualified. Happy was then defeated by {{AP|Pikachu}} using his {{m|Thunder Shock}}. Happy was last seen in ''[[EP080|Friends to the End]]'' during Ritchie's battle with [[Assunta]]. Happy's known moves are {{m|Sleep Powder}} and {{m|Whirlwind}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |nick=Cruise |trainer=Ritchie |pkmn=Pupitar |type1=Rock |type2=Ground |img=Ritchie Cruise.png |epnum=EP220 |epname=The Mystery is History |vaen=Eric Stuart |desc='''Cruise''' (Japanese: '''クルーズ''' ''Cruise'') is Ritchie's {{p|Pupitar}}. It first appeared when [[Butch]] and [[Cassidy]] were attempting to steal [[Silver (Lugia)|a baby Lugia]], but {{Ash}} and Ritchie refused to let that happen. It was very strong in battle, and it caused the two [[Team Rocket]] members to retreat. Ritchie later used Cruise in ''[[EP222|A Promise is a Promise]]''. Butch and Cassidy were once again trying to prevent the Trainers from rescuing Silver and its {{an|Lugia|mother}}, so Ritchie called upon it to take care of them and the other {{tc|Team Rocket Grunt}}s in the area. After it defeated them, Cruise helped Ash and {{an|Misty}} free Silver from its cage by tackling the bars after [[Ash's Cyndaquil]], {{AP|Totodile}}, and {{TP|Misty|Poliwhirl}} had weakened them. Cruise's known moves are {{m|Headbutt}} (incorrectly referred to as Take Down in the dub) and {{m|Sandstorm}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |nick=Rose |trainer=Ritchie |pkmn=Taillow |type1=Normal |type2=Flying |img=Ritchie Rose.png |epnum=HS08 |epname=Oaknapped! |vajp=Chinami Nishimura |vaen=Kayzie Rogers |desc='''Rose''' (Japanese: '''ローズ''' ''Rose'') is Ritchie's {{p|Taillow}}. When Ritchie, {{Tracey}}, and [[Officer Jenny]] were looking for the missing {{an|Professor Oak}}, Ritchie sent out Rose for help. Tracey commented that {{Ash}} also has a {{AP|Taillow}}, and Ritchie replied that he and Ash tend to catch a lot of the same Pokémon (referring to their {{p|Pikachu}}, {{p|Charmeleon}}, and {{p|Butterfree}}). In ''[[HS13|Celebi and Joy!]]'', Ritchie used Rose alongside [[Zippo]] and [[Sparky]] to defeat the Pokémon of a [[demolition crew]] who threatened two [[Nurse Joy|Nurses Joy]]. Rose's known moves are {{m|Gust}} (Taillow cannot legally learn Gust in the games) and {{m|Double Team}}.}} =====Status unknown===== {{TrainerPoké |nick=Spearow or Tentacool |type1=??? |img=Ritchie Assunta Spearow.png |img2=Ritchie Assunta Tentacool.png |cap=Spearow |cap2=Tentacool |epnum=EP080 |epname=Friends to the End |desc=Ritchie had at least three other Pokémon during the [[Indigo Plateau Conference]] as he participated in a [[Full Battle]]. It is uncertain which ones belonged to him. However, the beginning scene in ''[[EP080|Friends to the End]]'' narrowed the situation a bit, revealing that he owns either {{p|Spearow}} or {{p|Tentacool}}. None of Spearow's moves are known.
Tentacool's only known move is {{m|Bubble}} (Tentacool could not legally learn Bubble at the time).}} =====Borrowed===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Nurse Joy |pkmn=Ponyta |type1=Fire |img=Ritchie Ponyta.png |epnum=HS13 |epname=Celebi and Joy! |desc=Ritchie rode [[Nurse Joy]]'s {{p|Ponyta}} from [[Marion Town]], successfully changing the past by preventing {{OBP|Nick|HS13}}'s death. None of Ponyta's moves are known.}} =====Dub only===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Ritchie |pkmn=Eevee |type1=Normal |img=133Eevee.png |epnum=HS08 |epname=Oaknapped! |desc=Ritchie mentioned having an {{p|Eevee}} in the dub when he consulted {{an|Professor Oak}} for advice on evolving it in ''[[HS08|Oaknapped!]]''. It was not mentioned in the Japanese version. None of Eevee's moves are known.}}
